clusters.title: Daily FT to cost Rs. 100 from 4 May

versions.title: Daily FT to cost Rs. 100 from 4 May
versions.deck: Due to the increasing cost of distribution, energy, and imported materials required to publish the Daily FT, we regret to inform readers that we are compelled to increase the price of the Daily FT to Rs. 100 with effect from 4 May.

clusters.title: Eran heads nine-member SLC Restructuring Committee

versions.title: Eran heads nine-member SLC Restructuring Committee
versions.deck: Sports Minister Sunil Kumara Gamage has appointed a nine-member Restructuring Committee for Sri Lanka Cricket (SLC) to run the affairs of cricket in the country, with former MP and State Minister Eran Wickramaratne as Chairman.

clusters.title: Eran quits SJB committees

versions.title: Eran quits SJB committees
versions.deck: Former Samagi Jana Balawegaya (SJB) MP Eran Wickramaratne has resigned from the party’s Working Committee and Management Committee after assuming duties as Chairman of the Restructuring Committee of Sri Lanka Cricket (SLC), SJB General Secretary Ranjith Madduma Bandara said yesterday. SJB sources said that Wickramaratne was due to be suspended from the party for breach.

clusters.title: Seylan Bank 1Q PAT up 5.25% to Rs. 2.91 b

versions.title: Seylan Bank 1Q PAT up 5.25% to Rs. 2.91 b
versions.deck: Seylan Bank PLC has reported a Profit After Tax (PAT) of Rs. 2.91 billion in the first quarter of 2026, up 5.25% from a year ago. The bank said it recorded a Profit Before Income Tax (PBT) of Rs. 4,548 million in 1Q 2026, against Rs. 4,199 million a year ago, reflecting a growth of 8.31%.

clusters.title: JXG up 37% on debut

versions.title: JXG up 37% on debut
versions.deck: Janashakthi Ltd., (JXG) ended 37% on the up yesterday, debuting on the Colombo Stock Exchange (CSE) Main Board. The share price gained Rs. 3.70 to close at Rs. 13.70. JXG successfully concluded its Rs. 5 billion initial public offering (IPO) at Rs. 10 per share earlier this month. It was the largest IPO in the past 14 years.

clusters.title: One Love Reggae Festival 2026 set for 7-9 August

versions.title: One Love Reggae Festival 2026 set for 7-9 August
versions.deck: South Asia’s first ever “One Love Reggae Festival” will be held from 7 to 9 August 2026 in Bentota Beach, its organisers announced yesterday. The festival will feature 9 legendary international reggae headlining artists making it one of the largest reggae gatherings ever staged in the region. Starting daily from 5.00 p.m. onwards, fans can expect three days of vibrant music, cultural expression, and unity.

clusters.title: RPCs prepare palm oil investments ahead of potential ban lift

versions.title: RPCs prepare palm oil investments ahead of potential ban lift
versions.deck: Regional Plantation Companies (RPCs) are preparing to invest in palm oil cultivation, expecting the Government to lift the seven-year ban. The shift was outlined at an industry roundtable organised by the Palm Oil Industry Association (POIA) and Watawala Plantations PLC, where companies set out plans to expand cultivation if policy changes. POIA Chief Operating Officer Yajith de Silva said the Plantations Ministry-appointed 13-member expert com

clusters.title: IRCSL rolls out digital motor insurance card

versions.title: IRCSL rolls out digital motor insurance card
versions.deck: The Insurance Regulatory Commission of Sri Lanka (IRCSL), together with the Insurance Association of Sri Lanka (IASL) and the Sri Lanka Police, has introduced the country’s first digital motor insurance card, marking a shift towards real-time verification and paperless enforcement.

clusters.title: PUCSL opens public consultation on electricity tariffs revision

versions.title: PUCSL opens public consultation on electricity tariffs revision
versions.deck: The Public Utilities Commission of Sri Lanka (PUCSL) yesterday announced launching a public consultation process following a revised electricity generation cost estimate submitted by National System Operator Ltd., on 27 April, driven largely by rising global fuel prices.

clusters.title: Hela Apparel unit exits UK-based Focus Brands for $ 8 m

versions.title: Hela Apparel unit exits UK-based Focus Brands for $ 8 m
versions.deck: Hela Apparel Holdings PLC yesterday confirmed the divestment of its stake in UK-based Focus Brands Ltd., to Emerald Investments Ltd., for a total consideration of $ 8 million. The company said its wholly-owned subsidiary, Hela Brands Ltd., (Mauritius), sold the entirety of its shareholding in Focus Brands Ltd., to two investors, Mohamed Salim Suhurdeen and Mohamed Salihu Fazeldeen, who are the shareholders of Emerald Investments.

clusters.title: Shammi Silva & Co. steps down from SLC

versions.title: Shammi Silva & Co. steps down from SLC
versions.deck: So it’s finally official. Sri Lanka Cricket (SLC) President Shammi Silva has, along with his members of the Executive Committee, tendered their resignations from their respective posts with effect from yesterday. An SLC media release states: “The President of SLC, Shammi Silva, has tendered his resignation from the post, effective today. Along with him, the office bearers and members of the Executive Committee of the SLC have also submitted thei

clusters.title: FIFA confirms new World Cup rule on yellow cards to reduce suspensions

versions.title: FIFA confirms new World Cup rule on yellow cards to reduce suspensions
versions.deck: FIFA has tweaked World Cup rules on yellow cards to ensure fewer players are suspended for key elimination games, with single yellow cards to be cancelled after the group stage and after the quarter-finals. An extra amnesty for yellow cards – wiping player disciplinary records twice during the expanded tournament in North America – was proposed at a meeting on Tuesday of FIFA’s ruling council. Later, FIFA issued a statement approving the change

clusters.title: First-ever Colombo Marathon in September

versions.title: First-ever Colombo Marathon in September
versions.deck: The Sports and Youth Affairs Ministry this week announced that the ‘Colombo Marathon,’ organised for the first time by the Ministry, will be held in Colombo in September. Gamage emphasised that this event will be instrumental in placing Sri Lanka in a prominent position on the global map as a premier international sports tourism destination. With an expected participation of over 4,000 local and foreign athletes, this marathon will also serve a

clusters.title: SLC grants Rs. 10 m to rising javelin athlete Rumesh Tharanga

versions.title: SLC grants Rs. 10 m to rising javelin athlete Rumesh Tharanga
versions.deck: Sri Lanka Cricket (SLC) provided a financial grant of Rs. 10 million to rising javelin thrower Rumesh Tharanga Pathirage, earlier this week. This support was extended under the direction of SLC President Shammi Silva and the Executive Committee of SLC following a request made by Youth Affairs and Sports Minister Sunil Kumara Gamage. This initiative is part of SLC’s ongoing efforts to support and promote sports beyond cricket, as well as to assi

clusters.title: Scara Live powers South Asia’s first-ever Tapeball Asia Cup in Sri Lanka

versions.title: Scara Live powers South Asia’s first-ever Tapeball Asia Cup in Sri Lanka
versions.deck: Sri Lanka takes centre stage and is set to make history as Scara Live, the live experiences vertical of global sports, gaming, and culture agency Scara, has partnered Afghanistan Tapeball Cricket to launch for the first time the ‘Tapeball Asia Cup’ and first official continental Tapeball tournament sanctioned by the International Tapeball Council. The momentous event will take place in September at the Colombo Cricket Club Ground, featuring top

clusters.title: PSG beat Bayern 5-4 in record-breaking Champions League semi-final first leg

versions.title: PSG beat Bayern 5-4 in record-breaking Champions League semi-final first leg
versions.deck: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia and Ousmane Dembele scored twice each as Paris Saint-Germain (PSG) beat Bayern Munich 5-4 in an epic first leg of their Champions League semi-final, an extraordinary encounter that became the highest-scoring match ever at this stage of the competition. The first half alone on Tuesday night was wild, with Harry Kane giving Bayern the lead from a penalty only for Kvaratskhelia to equalise before Joao Neves headed the hosts in

clusters.title: Liverpool expect Salah return before end of season

versions.title: Liverpool expect Salah return before end of season
versions.deck: Liverpool expect Mohamed Salah to return from injury before the end of the season after he was forced off against Crystal Palace on Saturday. There were concerns that the 33-year-old forward may have played his last game for the club when he went off in the second half with a suspected hamstring issue. It would have been a sad end for Salah, who announced last month that he would leave after a glittering nine-year spell at Anfield, in which he

clusters.title: Padel House announces expansion with new strategic investment

versions.title: Padel House announces expansion with new strategic investment
versions.deck: Padel House, the company that first brought padel to Sri Lanka and has since built the sport’s most established presence in Colombo, has announced the entry of two new investors: Mahela Jayawardene, the former Sri Lanka cricket captain, and Trade Promoters Limited (TPL), a diversified business group with commercial interests across Sri Lanka and the Maldives. The investment round closes a formative chapter for the business and marks the beginni

clusters.title: SLC honours pioneer of women’s cricket late Gwen Herat

versions.title: SLC honours pioneer of women’s cricket late Gwen Herat
versions.deck: Sri Lanka Cricket (SLC) has decided to dedicate the Major Club Women’s 50-over tournament in memory of the late Gwen Herat, the Founding President of the Sri Lanka Women’s Cricket Association. This decision has been made in recognition of the outstanding service rendered by Herat towards founding of the Women’s Cricket Association in the country. It was under her leadership that the Sri Lanka Women’s Cricket Association was established in 1997,

clusters.title: Healthy success for SLASSCOM’s Fit Hit 2026

versions.title: Healthy success for SLASSCOM’s Fit Hit 2026
versions.deck: With Work having evolved to be faster and more demanding, many organisations are rethinking their approach, positioning employee wellbeing not as a perk, but as a critical foundation for sustained performance and growth. It’s within this context that SLASSCOM introduced Fit Hit 2026. Not just as a fitness challenge, but as a structured push towards better habits and stronger workplace culture. clusters.title: Treasury Secretary declines CoPF summons today

versions.title: Treasury Secretary declines CoPF summons today
versions.deck: Treasury Secretary Dr. Harshana Suriyapperuma has declined to appear before the Parliamentary Committee on Public Finance (CoPF) today stating that President and Finance Minister Anura Kumara Dissanayake was expected to address Parliament on the $ 2.5 million Treasury breach. CoPF Chairman MP Dr. Harsha de Silva was not having any of it. “This is a kick in the face of the promised ‘system change’ the people of this country voted for. It is also

clusters.title: Cabinet keeps $ 2.5 m Treasury breach off agenda

versions.title: Cabinet keeps $ 2.5 m Treasury breach off agenda
versions.deck: The Government said yesterday that neither President and Finance Minister Anura Kumara Dissanayake nor the Cabinet had discussed the reported $ 2.5 million Treasury cyber breach and internal investigation, leaving the matter to the Finance Ministry and external investigative agencies. versions.title: Govt. under increasing fire, refuses P’ment debate into $ 2.5 m Treasury heist
